All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
Board
the object Board
Cell
the object cell for our board
ClassicalBoard
the object ClassicalBoard inherits from Cell
Game
the object Game
GooseCell
the object GooseCell who inherits from Cell
GooseMain
 
NormalCell
the object NormalCell who inherits from Cell
Player
A player in the "jeu de l'oie" game
TeleportationCell
the object Teleportation inherits from Cell
TrapCell
the object TrapCell inherits from Cell
WaitCell
the object WaitCell inherits from Cell
